winning_test.source:
import pytest

from gradebook.analytics import letter_grade


def test_letter_grade_includes_80_in_b_range():
    assert letter_grade(80) == "B"
winning_test.targeted_behavior: At the inclusive B-grade boundary, a score of 80 must return 'B' (the mutant incorrectly falls through to 'C').
